name: Pasta with Marinara Sauce and Ricotta
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook bacon in a large saucepan until crisp; drain on paper towel. Discard all but 1 tablespoon drippings from the skillet.
2. Add onion and red pepper flakes; cook over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until tender, about 5 minutes.
3. Add marinara sauce and bring to a boil.
4. In a mixing bowl, beat ricotta, Parmesan, salt, and pepper until creamy. Stir in parsley.
5. Toss pasta immediately with marinara sauce and bacon. Serve the remaining ricotta on the side.
